changes_tested: SB-003: Tooltips on collapsed nav items
SB-006: CSS transition instead of Motion spring for width

failures.test: optimistic-ui.spec.ts — page navigation renders with transition
failures.error: page.click: Test timeout of 45000ms exceeded — waiting for locator('a[href="/clusters"]')
failures.hypothesis: v196 SB-005/SB-011 changed Clusters sidebar link from href='/clusters' to href='#' (accordion toggle). Selector a[href="/clusters"] no longer matches the sidebar nav item. Reproduced on re-run.
failures.root_cause: SB-005 inline accordion + SB-011 inline cluster sub-nav changed Clusters nav anchor href from /clusters to # (accordion parent). Tests using a[href="/clusters"] selector are broken by intentional product change.
failures.suggested_fix: Replace page.click('a[href="/clusters"]') with page.getByTestId('nav-item-clusters') or use page.locator('nav').getByText('Clusters').click() to handle the accordion parent. Then expand sub-nav and click actual /clusters link.

failures.test: optimistic-ui.spec.ts — reduced motion preference disables animations
failures.error: page.click: Test timeout of 45000ms exceeded — waiting for locator('a[href="/clusters"]')
failures.hypothesis: Same root cause as above — a[href="/clusters"] selector fails due to SB-005/SB-011 sidebar changes. href is now '#' on the accordion parent.
failures.root_cause: SB-005 inline accordion + SB-011 changed Clusters nav anchor to href='#'. Selector no longer valid.
failures.suggested_fix: Same fix as above — use data-testid or nav text locator.

failures.test: phase3-v194-animation.spec.ts — clicking a nav item navigates correctly
failures.error: page.waitForURL: Timeout 10000ms exceeded — waiting for navigation to /clusters after clicking a[href="/clusters"]
failures.hypothesis: Same root cause — Clusters nav link href changed to '#' by SB-005 accordion. Clicking it expands the accordion instead of navigating to /clusters. waitForURL(/clusters/) times out because navigation never happens.
failures.root_cause: SB-005 inline accordion changes Clusters nav item from direct link to accordion toggle (href='#'). waitForURL after click fails because click opens sub-nav, not navigates.
failures.suggested_fix: After clicking accordion parent, click the actual /clusters sub-nav link. Or use page.getByTestId('nav-item-clusters-link') for direct navigation.

analysis.common_pattern: All 3 failures share the same root cause: a[href='/clusters'] selector no longer valid after SB-005/SB-011 sidebar changes. The Clusters nav item is now an accordion parent (href='#') not a direct link.
analysis.classification: test-bug — tests need selector updates to match v196 sidebar architecture
analysis.note: The Clusters inline accordion and sub-nav are working as designed in v196. The tests were written before SB-005/SB-011 changes and need to be updated to handle the new navigation structure.
